scripts.install:all: npm install --include=dev --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm install --include=dev --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c green,blue "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
